s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: The Washington-Beijing Currency Conspiracy / The Great Dollar Betrayal: By RAISING the value of the Chinese yuan, Washington and China will automatically CRUSH the value of the U.S. dollar... So Washington can repay its otherwise unpayable debts with cheaper dollars! Look: The 'official' U.S. national debt is now over $15 trillion... But when you add in the debts Washington owes to veterans, seniors and government pensioners, the total amount is nearly ten times more: A staggering $145 trillion. That's far more debt than Washington can ever hope to pay. In fact, Washington's only hope of avoiding default is to destroy the value of its own currency... Then pay its debts with dollars that are only a shadow of their former selves. Plus, with a weaker-dollar and stronger Chinese yuan, China can buy up even more of our debt and protect the massive investment it has already made in America by helping Washington avoid default. That's a massive 'win-win' for both Washington and Beijing! Plus, a rising yuan will once and for all solve Beijing's #1 economic problem: Rising domestic inflation.

lead.full_text: In this little book, I reveal facts that are so disturbing that most people will simply refuse to believe them. But I must warn you: Ignoring this warning will have consequences - and those consequences will be catastrophic for millions of Americans. On the other hand, every crisis creates great opportunities - and this one is no exception. Because in terms of its sheer power to create wealth, the event I'm talking about DWARFS the industrial revolution that created hundreds of millionaires at the beginning of the 20th Century... It towers miles above the computer, internet and technology revolutions that created thousands of millionaires - and hundreds of billionaires - in the 1990s... It's already creating the greatest explosion of wealth in the history of mankind. At its core, though, the story I'm about to tell you is one of betrayal: The cruelest, most callous financial treachery in our nation's 236-year history. It's a story that's so shocking, nobody in the U.S. media has dared report it: I have uncovered compelling evidence that the Chinese government is conspiring with Washington, D.C. to impoverish you and sentence your children and your grandchildren to lives of financial servitude.
lead.hook_sentence: In this little book, I reveal facts that are so disturbing that most people will simply refuse to believe them.
lead.transition_to_body: Now please don't misunderstand: I'm not a political man and this is NOT a political book...

three_part_structure.what_they_think_problem_is: Market volatility and economic cycles are causing investment losses and threatening retirement security. The solution is diversification, buy-and-hold strategies, and trusting government economic policy.
three_part_structure.what_real_problem_is: Washington and Beijing are actively conspiring to devalue the dollar to avoid default on America's $145 trillion debt. By raising the yuan's value, Washington can repay debts with cheaper dollars while China gains buying power and protects its US debt investment. This coordinated currency manipulation is a deliberate betrayal designed to transfer wealth from American citizens to government coffers and Chinese interests.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Traditional investment strategies fail because they assume government acts in citizens' best interests. Dollar-denominated assets lose value not from normal market forces but from deliberate government policy to destroy currency purchasing power. Diversification into US stocks/bonds doesn't help when the underlying currency is being systematically devalued through Washington-Beijing coordination. Wall Street's 'buy and hold' advice accelerates losses because brokers profit from keeping you invested in dollar-denominated assets even as the government destroys the dollar's value.

villain_profile.villain_quote: Any incumbent president would see what a weaker dollar did for U.S. stocks in 2009: It gave birth to huge rallies! Having the stock market explode higher just before the elections would be a godsend.
villain_profile.secondary_villain: U.S. mainstream media refusing to report the conspiracy, Wall Street brokers keeping investors in dollar-denominated assets

So Washington can repay its otherwise unpayable debts with cheaper dollars! Look: The 'official' U.S. national debt is now over $15 trillion... specimens.quote: According to the International Monetary Fund (IMF), by 2016, the United States will no longer be the world's number one economic power. According to the IMF, China will be richer than America in less than five years. But the prestigious Peterson Institute says the IMF is wrong. Based on data just published by the University of Pennsylvania, Peterson has proven that the Chinese economy will NOT surpass America's by 2016. Nor will it happen in 2017 or even in 2020, for that matter. Peterson and the University of Pennsylvania say China is ALREADY the world's #1 economic power.

When you adjust for the domestic purchasing power of respective currencies... The U.S. economy produced goods and services valued at $14.6 trillion in 2010... But China's Gross Domestic Product soared to $14.8 trillion. In other words... China's economy is already larger than America's is.

According to the official figures from both Washington and Beijing, the U.S. economy grew about 1.7% in 2011. China's economy grew 9.2%. That's more than SEVEN AND ONE HALF TIMES FASTER; enough to nearly DOUBLE the size of China's already massive economy once each decade.

While China is virtually debt-free, Washington owes $145 TRILLION! The Beijing government has almost no debt... But Washington has nearly $145 trillion in debt and obligations. China has $3.2 trillion in cash... But Washington has almost no cash on hand and has to borrow nearly half of every dollar it spends - much of it is borrowed from China.

The U.S. has about 160 million workers... China has 810 million workers - more than 5 times more. 97% of all Chinese workers are employed... But 14 million U.S. workers are either unemployed or underemployed. In China's urban areas, wages ROSE 7.6% in 2011... Meanwhile, inflation-adjusted wages for U.S. workers dropped 1.7%.

Since 2009, President Obama has spent more than $10.6 trillion, and run up trillion-dollar deficits year after year. To fund Washington's spending addiction, Treasury Secretary Timothy Geithner has borrowed an estimated $4 trillion since 2009. And Ben Bernanke - the Chairman of the U.S. Federal Reserve - has created nearly $8 trillion out of thin air since 2009.

As a result, the value and the buying power of the dollar have already begun to plunge: Gasoline prices have shot the moon - you're paying over 25% more than you paid just 24 months ago! The price for heating oil rocketed 29% in a recent 12-month period... Milk and cheese prices are up 18% and 15%... beef and veal up 17%... coffee prices up more than 20%... and egg prices have soared nearly 30%!

The U.S. dollar is already being abandoned by many countries and companies in favor of the Chinese currency - the yuan: Investors can now buy yuan-denominated bonds in Hong Kong. Caterpillar and McDonald's recently financed their mainland China projects directly via yuan bond offerings instead of U.S. dollars. China's trade with Russia, Vietnam and Thailand is now being settled in yuan instead of U.S. dollars. Apple Computer is even accepting iTunes payments in yuan!

Larry Edelson's uncannily accurate forecasts: The stock market crash of 1987 and the rally that followed... The bursting of the tech stock bubble in 2000 that cost U.S. investors an estimated $6.5 trillion in losses... The 2007 collapse in U.S. stocks that drove the S&P 500 56% lower... The bottom of gold prices at $255 in 1999 and the bull market that has taken the yellow metal to well over $1,800 per ounce... In June of 2004, he warned that the price of oil would start a rocket ride higher, from $38 to well over $100 a barrel.

Over the past year, you could have used these muscle-bound vehicles to go for gains of: 185% on China Petroleum... 200% on Yanzhou Coal... 257% on New Gold, and... 369% on CNOOC... That 369% gain is enough to turn a $25,000 grubstake into $117,200.

Nucor up 23.3%... U.S. Steel up 24.3%... Silver Wheaton up 26.4%... Walter Energy up 30%... Southern Copper up 31.8%... Uranium One up 32.3%... Yanzhou Coal up 33.4%... Alpha Natural Resources up 41%... Ivanhoe Mines up 49.4%... Jiangxi Copper up 53.1%... and Novagold up 73.53%. All in a single year!
Mike C. of Inverness, Illinois: 'I've only been a subscriber for a couple of months. So far I'm very impressed. Those moves saved me approximately $50,000 in the last two months.'
Reverend James B. of Powhatan, Virginia: 'Confidence in your honest predictions have helped to allay any worries about losing my retirement funds. I am 50% better off because of trusting you, Larry.'

fssit_candidates.statement: If there's one single gift I can give them, it's this: Always seek the truth, understanding fully well that often, things are not really what they seem to be. I hope and pray that the leaders of the world will come clean with how they're handling the greatest financial crisis in modern history. So far, they haven't.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates the reader's nagging suspicion that government narratives about economic recovery don't match reality - explains why official statements feel disconnected from their lived experience of declining purchasing power and financial anxiety

fssit_candidates.statement: I have uncovered compelling evidence that the Chinese government is conspiring with Washington, D.C. to impoverish you and sentence your children and your grandchildren to lives of financial servitude.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Names the exact pattern they've sensed but couldn't articulate - explains why all mainstream financial advice has failed, why diversification hasn't protected them, why their dollar's buying power keeps declining despite government assurances of economic health. The conspiracy frame explains EVERYTHING.

fssit_candidates.statement: Just imagine how voters would react if the president stepped before the microphones and said... 'My fellow Americans, we politicians have spent too much money. We can't pay our debts. The only way to avoid default is to destroy the value of your money and then repay our debt with cheaper dollars. Of course, that means your cost of living will double and double again and most of you will be reduced to poverty...'
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Articulates exactly what the reader has been feeling but couldn't prove - that government is deliberately sacrificing citizens' wealth for political survival. This 'imagined truth' statement creates the 'Finally someone said it' moment by voicing what government would say if honest.

fssit_candidates.statement: Look: Everybody knows that China is on the move. But what most Americans do NOT know - what our Media steadfastly refuses to admit is this: China is already so rich, it can now DICTATE economic policy to the world; even to the United States of America.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why American economic sovereignty feels diminished, why Washington seems powerless to act in citizens' interests, why policy decisions favor foreign creditors - because America is no longer economically dominant and China calls the shots
